title: Board of Directors Meeting
description: Monthly business meeting of the Board of Directors. Members and the public are welcome to attend the open session.

title: Executive Committee Meeting
description: Leadership planning session for reviewing center policies, budgets, and upcoming programs.

title: Volunteer Orientation & Training
description: Orientation session for new volunteers. Learn about operations, reception hosting, and community activities.

title: Facilities & Rental Committee
description: Reviewing facility maintenance, safety updates, upgrade projects, and rental operations guidelines.

title: Center Update Town Hall
description: Open community meeting to share updates regarding center membership, activities, and operational plans.
